query: SELECT name, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM users GROUP BY name HAVING cnt > 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2WVoNFXx8YRPBD4.root --database JzcMSgtkjzvCc45KUk33Lc --execute SELECT name, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM users GROUP BY name HAVING cnt > 1;
